lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is clean with some light wear on the driver's seat. All mechanical and electrical components are functioning as expected.
Fair condition.

Looking for a reliable ride at a great price? This car is a solid choice for anyone needing a dependable daily driver. It’s in fair condition, showing some honest cosmetic wear and signs of a life well-lived, but it still has plenty of miles left to offer. If you're looking for value and function over a showroom finish, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant cosmetic issues, including widespread paint peeling, several large dents, and noticeable rust forming along the wheel wells and undercarriage. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears in the seats and a cracked dashboard. Mechanically, the engine runs but requires immediate attention due to a persistent oil leak and a rough idle. The tires are near the end of their life and the brakes will likely need replacement soon. This car is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows some signs of age, including noticeable paint fading on the hood and roof, along with several scuffs and a few small dents on the side panels. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear, with some staining on the upholstery and minor cracking on the dashboard. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though it will likely need a new set of tires and a brake service in the near future. While it is no longer in showroom shape, it remains a dependable option for someone looking for an affordable and honest vehicle. Sold as-is.

The car is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with minimal wear. The interior is clean and shows standard signs of use. The engine and mechanical systems are in reliable working order.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and durability, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist seeking a high-caliber driving experience.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? I'm parting ways with this beauty, and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in really nice shape, super clean, and runs like a dream. Whether you’re commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car won't let you down. I've taken great care of it, and I’d love to see it go to a good home. Come say hi and take it for a test drive!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced VANOS system for peak variable valve timing performance. The drivetrain utilizes a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring mechanical grip out of every apex. Structural integrity has been prioritized with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings across the multi-link rear suspension. The chassis exhibits neutral handling characteristics with precise turn-in, while the braking system retains excellent thermal capacity. A mechanically sound example that balances visceral analog feedback with reliable performance engineering.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This premium executive sedan represents a fantastic balance of luxury and value. The exterior is finished in a timeless metallic silver that retains a deep shine, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia from highway commutes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the charcoal leather seats are supple and well-maintained, showing only light natural creasing. Mechanically, this car is solid and dependable, having undergone a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection. It features a smooth-shifting automatic transmission, a responsive turbocharged engine, and a complete service log documenting its consistent upkeep. All electronic components, including the navigation system and heated seats, are fully operational. This is a well-loved vehicle that is ready for its next owner to drive home with confidence.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, maintained to a high standard. This vehicle offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability, having been thoroughly vetted to ensure its operational integrity. It stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a premium experience and lasting value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure reliable performance and enduring aesthetic appeal. It stands as a testament to balanced ownership, offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior. A prudent acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands quality and mechanical integrity without the premium of a showroom-new price point.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride and it's looking for a brand new home. This car has been so reliable for me and still has tons of life left in it! It drives like a dream and the interior is super clean—you can tell it's been well-loved and looked after. It’s perfect for road trips or just zipping around town. You’re going to absolutely love how it handles! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power through eight individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and a recent four-wheel alignment to factory M-specifications. Preventative maintenance is up to date, including rod bearing replacement with VAC treated shells and a fresh throttle actuator
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable runner.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully in its original factory finish. The exterior retains a deep gloss, showing only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful, respectful use. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while every button, dial, and digital display functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs flawlessly, benefiting from a rigorous service schedule and recent comprehensive fluid flushes. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension remains tight and responsive, providing a smooth and confident ride. Sold with a complete service history and a non-smoker interior, this car offers a perfect balance of performance and dependability for the discerning driver who values quality and care.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both reliability and performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional value for the discerning motorist seeking a balance of quality and long-term dependability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. This automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence. It represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber vehicle that has been preserved with professional care. Experience the perfect synergy of luxury and proven capability in this exceptional offering.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable new-to-you ride? I've absolutely loved driving this car, and it's been kept in really wonderful shape over the years. It runs smoothly, looks great, and is totally ready for all your upcoming road trips! It's been well-loved and well-maintained, so you can just hop in and go. Come by and take it for a test drive—I'm sure you'll fall in love with it just like I did!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving linear power through its individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, the drivetrain remains tight and responsive. The chassis benefits from upgraded Bilstein dampers and reinforced subframe mounting points, ensuring structural integrity during spirited cornering. Recent service includes a VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment, optimizing timing and volumetric efficiency. Riding on staggered alloys wrapped in fresh performance rubber, this example balances raw mechanical engagement with daily drivability. A mechanically sound driver's car ready for the apex.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor stone chips consistent with careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and true. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring supple upholstery with minimal wear and a dashboard free of any sun damage; every electronic feature, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine delivers smooth, reliable power, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recently completed multi-point inspection. With its quiet cabin and confident handling, this car represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality driver that has clearly been a point of pride for its previous owner.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and roadworthiness. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking dependable luxury and verified value.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic profile. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous professional evaluation to ensure optimal performance and long-term reliability. An ideal acquisition for the sophisticated buyer who prioritizes engineering excellence and proven roadworthiness.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable daily driver and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, so you know you’re getting a car that’s ready for many more adventures. It drives like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take the wheel. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it for yourself!

Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable engine.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and style. The exterior paint retains a beautiful luster, showing only the minor, expected road wear of a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean; the seats are supportive and free of any significant wear or odors, and all power features—from the climate control to the infotainment system—operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is sound, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has been serviced regularly. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. It provides a quiet, composed ride that makes it an ideal choice for both daily commutes and longer journeys.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances proven performance with exceptional value. Each component has been thoroughly evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for long-term reliability and roadworthiness.
